zh.lifeSummary: Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire於1271年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾。她於大約1294年與David de Graham Laird of Dundaff在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1308年在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴享年37歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire于1271年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾。她于大约1294年与David de Graham Laird of Dundaff在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1308年在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: Erskine-
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Erskine in Renfrewshire, first recorded in 1226 in the form Erskyn.
History: A family of this name have held a number of Scottish titles, including the earldoms of Mar, Buchan, Kellie, and Rosslyn.

variants.name: Erskin
meanings: Scottish (central Scotland and Fife): variant of   Erskine  . This form of the surname is now more common in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

en.lifeSummary: Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire was born in 1271, in Ayrshire, Scotland. She married David de Graham Laird of Dundaff about 1294, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1308, in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire est née en 1271, à Ayrshire, Écosse. Elle a épousé David de Graham Laird of Dundaff environ 1294, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1308, à Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 37 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Erskine- of Perthshireは1271年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアで生まれた。約1294年にスコットランドでDavid de Graham Laird of Dundaffと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1308年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーで37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire(은)는 1271년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1294년 스컷랜드에서 David de Graham Laird of Dundaff(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1308년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire nasceu em 1271, em Ayrshire, Scotland. Ela casou-se com David de Graham Laird of Dundaff aproximadamente 1294, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1308, em Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire родилась в 1271 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David de Graham Laird of Dundaff около 1294 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1308 г. в местности дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 37 лет.
